name: hundred-million-offers
description: Create irresistible offers using the Value Equation, bonus stacking, risk-reversing guarantees, and ethical scarcity. Use when the user mentions "pricing strategy", "irresistible offer", "bonuses and guarantees", "value-to-price ratio", "offer naming", "grand slam offer", "guarantee strategy", or "premium pricing justification". Also trigger when packaging products for higher perceived value, designing money-back guarantees, or structuring pricing tiers to maximize conversions. Covers the MAGIC
author: wondelai
